profile.name: Windows Roadmap P0 Existing Sensor Contract

tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
tests.command: cmd.exe /d /c "echo tamandua-phishing-attachment > %TEMP%\tamandua-phishing-attachment.txt & type %TEMP%\tamandua-phishing-attachment.txt & del /f /q %TEMP%\tamandua-phishing-attachment.txt & ping -n 9 127.0.0.1 > nul"
tests.name: Spearphishing Attachment: telemetry contract

tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
tests.command: cmd.exe /d /c "whoami & hostname & ver & echo tamandua-live-response-marker-378bab4e4077 & ping -n 9 127.0.0.1 > nul"
tests.name: PowerShell: telemetry contract

tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
tests.command: cmd.exe /d /c "whoami & hostname & ver & echo tamandua-live-response-marker-378bab4e4077 & ping -n 9 127.0.0.1 > nul"
tests.name: PowerShell: telemetry contract

tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
tests.command: cmd.exe /d /c "reg add HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run /v TamanduaBenchRun /t REG_SZ /d tamandua-bench-run /f & reg query HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run /v TamanduaBenchRun & ping -n 8 127.0.0.1 > nul & reg delete HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run /v TamanduaBenchRun /f & ping -n 9 127.0.0.1 > nul"
tests.name: Registry Run Keys / Startup Folder: telemetry contract

tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
tests.name: Bypass User Account Control: telemetry contract

tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
